headline: Is Brown & Brown, Inc. (BRO) a Buy Now? Citigroup Turns Bullish on Valuation Opportunity
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 8 Most Oversold Large Cap Stocks to Buy. Brown & Brown, Inc. (NYSE:BRO) is among the best oversold stocks to invest in. TheFly reported on May 7 that BRO was upgraded by Citigroup from Neutral to Buy, while the price target remained unchanged at $70. The firm also raised […]
